text.title: Semantic Tokens and Modes Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from scope-of-theming + platform count to required modes and pipeline shape. Every leaf references a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — flat tokens are sufficient until theming need emerges
modes=[light,dark]; pipeline emits per-platform with pxToPt/pxToSp transforms
add brand-a/brand-b modes; split brand.* and action.* tokens; never duplicate full tree
add compact/comfortable modes; ensure CI mode-coverage gate is on
add high-contrast mode; visual-regression must snapshot HC mode on every PR

text.example: theming_scope=light_dark_only → platforms=[css,swift,compose] → pipeline emits all three with per-platform transforms; modes=[light,dark]; visual-regression both modes.
